def: A whole number that can be positive, negative, or zero, with no fraction part.
A number that is bigger in value. On a number line it sits farther to the right.
A number that is smaller in value. On a number line it sits farther to the left.
To put numbers in a line from least to greatest, or greatest to least.
A straight line with numbers marked in order, smaller on the left, bigger on the right.
example: On a number line, -1 sits left of 3.
